_comment: Synthetic Teams channel posts for the 45621-B material channel. Used for the people+chat multi-signal question.

teams_messages.author: PPL-005
teams_messages.text: Pulled the certs. Apex Alloys lot 24-118 hardness is 34 HRC, spec is 40-44 HRC. That's the material issue. I'd bet on material, not design. Quarantining and asking for a fresh lot.

teams_messages.author: PPL-004
teams_messages.text: Thanks Priya. Holding qualification sign-off until we re-run the hardness acceptance test on remachined units. This is the #1 program risk right now.

teams_messages.author: PPL-008
teams_messages.text: Apex Alloys confirmed a conforming replacement lot (24-126) ships in 5 business days with full cert. PO updated.

teams_messages.author: PPL-005
teams_messages.text: For the record: this is the second time in 12 months Apex Alloys has shipped an out-of-hardness Inconel 718 lot. We should consider a second source. I'm the materials POC on bar stock if anyone needs detail.

teams_messages.author: PPL-003
teams_messages.text: Design review done. Decision: it's the material lot, not the design. Remachine + re-test, qualification to 03-JUL. I own the recovery plan.
